title: Removal of Single-Stranded Extension using Mung Bean Nuclease (M0250)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c8b8q","text":"This is the protocol for the removal of single-stranded extension using Mung Bean Nuclease (M0250). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"6sefe","text":"Please see SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for hazards and safety warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Suspend DNA ( 0.1 μg/μl ) in 1X Mung Bean Nuclease Buffer or 1X NEBuffer 1.1, 2.1 or CutSmart ®.
Add 1.0 unit of Mung Bean Nuclease per μg DNA.
Inactivate the enzyme by phenol/chloroform extraction or by addition of SDS to 0.01%.
Recover the DNA by ethanol precipitation.
creator: New England   Biolabs
